This kernel appears to be a synthetic/toy benchmark kernel, likely hand-crafted to test specific memory access patterns. The use of arbitrary constants (17, 4095, 257, 8 iterations, 1.1f multiplier) and the bitwise-AND masking for address wrapping suggest it was written to stress-test cache behavior or demonstrate strided/irregular memory access patterns. It doesn't match any well-known benchmark suite, tutorial, or public codebase that I'm aware of.
